logistics.format: Two-phase exam: knowledge-based written exam (proctored) plus practical scenario-based incident response examination using EnCase Endpoint Investigator; 3 years validity

recommended_certs.rationale: CFSR builds on the same EnCase tooling as EnCE; analysts often hold EnCE first.

evaluation.rationale: All three personas agree at this tier; rationale reflects consensus.
